product_name: Contemporary 12m Luxury Studio – Turnkey High-Cube Living
primary_description: Step into the future of modular living with this meticulously crafted 12m High-Cube container home. Finished in a sophisticated matte Industrial Grey, this unit is designed for those who refuse to compromise on style or durability. The interior features an expansive open-plan layout with premium chevron flooring and a minimalist white gallery aesthetic. Large-format sliding glass doors dissolve the boundary between indoors and out, while the high-cube height offers an airy, residential feel often missing in standard conversions.
product_description: 12m (40ft) High Cube luxury studio container home. Designer kitchen with white cabinetry and gooseneck faucet, light oak chevron flooring, full SANS 10400-XA insulation, pre-installed split-unit air conditioner, and large black-framed aluminium sliding glass doors with vertical sliver windows.
unit_features: Size: 12.19m × 2.44m × 2.90m HC (~28-30m² interior) | Insulation: Double-layered with reflective foil barrier (SANS 10400-XA) | Flooring: Light-oak chevron herringbone laminate | Climate: External split-unit HVAC | Glazing: Black-framed aluminium sliding glass doors + vertical sliver windows | Wiring: SA electrical standards | Plumbing: Pre-installed for rapid on-site connection
included_items: 12m HC steel container | Designer white kitchen cabinetry | Sleek black gooseneck faucet | Integrated sink | Chevron laminate flooring | SANS 10400-XA insulation | Pre-installed split-unit air conditioner | Aluminium sliding glass doors | Vertical aluminium windows | SA-spec electrical wiring | Plumbing rough-in
optional_extras: Off-grid solar kit | Greywater recycling | Outdoor deck extension | Custom paint finishes | Premium appliance upgrades
excluded_items: Land | Site preparation | Municipal connection fees | Transport | Foundations
